mapper.insert: INSERT INTO travel_mate_comment (comment_id, mate_id, member_id, content, parent_id) VALUES (SEQ_MATE_COMMENT_ID.NEXTVAL, #{mateId}, #{memberId}, #{content}, #{parentId, jdbcType=NUMERIC})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT a.*, ROWNUM rnum FROM ( SELECT c.comment_id as commentId, c.mate_id as mateId, c.member_id as memberId, c.status, CASE WHEN c.status = 0 THEN '🚫 5회 이상 신고가 누적되어 숨김 처리된 댓글입니다.' ELSE c.content END as content, c.parent_id as parentId, TO_CHAR(c.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') as createdAt, u.nickname, u.profile_image as profilePhoto FROM travel_mate_comment c JOIN member2 u ON c.member_id = u.member_id JOIN member1 m1 ON c.member_id = m1.member_id WHERE c.mate_id = #{mateId} AND c.parent_id IS NULL AND m1.status = 1 ORDER BY c.created_at DESC ) a WHERE ROWNUM <= #{offset} + #{limit} ) WHERE rnum > #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM travel_mate_comment c JOIN member1 m1 ON c.member_id = m1.member_id WHERE c.mate_id = #{mateId} AND c.parent_id IS NULL AND m1.status = 1

SELECT c.comment_id as commentId, c.mate_id as mateId, c.member_id as memberId, c.status, CASE WHEN c.status = 0 THEN '🚫 5회 이상 신고가 누적되어 숨김 처리된 댓글입니다.' ELSE c.content END as content, c.parent_id as parentId, TO_CHAR(c.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') as createdAt, u.nickname, u.profile_image as profilePhoto FROM travel_mate_comment c JOIN member2 u ON c.member_id = u.member_id JOIN member1 m1 ON c.member_id = m1.member_id WHERE c.mate_id = #{mateId} AND c.parent_id IS NOT NULL AND m1.status = 1 ORDER BY c.created_at ASC
SELECT member_id FROM travel_mate_comment WHERE comment_id = #{commentId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM travel_mate_comment WHERE comment_id = #{commentId} OR parent_id = #{commentId}
